title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and characterizes this as marking the start of a permanent underclass. The video appears to discuss consequences of AI policy decisions.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues the ban will be permanent. He frames the development as the start of what he calls a permanent underclass, tying it to the consequences of AI policy decisions. The takeaway is his claim that the ban is irreversible and his reading of its broader social fallout.
